source.name: EIA Form 861 Annual Electric Power Industry Report (2024)
source.methodology: Utility annual electricity sales (MWh) from Sales_Ult_Cust worksheet distributed equally across each utility's service county-equivalents (Service_Territory worksheet). County-equivalent centroid geometry from US Census GeoJSON.
